
FUNCTION Main_コピー GLOBAL
    WebAutomation.LaunchChrome.LaunchChrome Url: $'''chrome://newtab/''' WindowState: WebAutomation.BrowserWindowState.Normal ClearCache: False ClearCookies: False WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60 Timeout: 60 PiPUserDataFolderMode: WebAutomation.PiPUserDataFolderModeEnum.AutomaticProfile TargetDesktop: $'''{\"DisplayName\":\"ローカル コンピューター\",\"Route\":{\"ServerType\":\"Local\",\"ServerAddress\":\"\"},\"DesktopType\":\"local\"}''' BrowserInstance=> Browser
    Display.InputDialog Title: $'''エリア選択''' Message: $'''移動先を番号で入力(1:宇都宮 2:埼玉群馬 3:茨城千葉 4:その他 5:栃木1 6:栃木2)''' DefaultValue: 1 InputType: Display.InputType.SingleLine IsTopMost: False UserInput=> UserInput ButtonPressed=> ButtonPressed3
    SWITCH UserInput
        CASE = 1
            SET TargetURL TO $'''https://www.hug-globalkidsmethod.link/hug/wm/'''
        CASE = 2
            SET TargetURL TO $'''https://www.hug-globalkidsmethod02.link/hug/wm/'''
        CASE = 3
            SET TargetURL TO $'''https://www.hug-globalkidsmethod03.link/hug/wm/'''
        CASE = 4
            SET TargetURL TO $'''https://www.hug-globalkidsmethod04.link/hug/wm/'''
        CASE = 5
            SET TargetURL TO $'''https://www.hug-globalkidsmethod05.link/hug/wm/'''
        CASE = 6
            SET TargetURL TO $'''https://www.hug-globalkidsmethod06.link/hug/wm/'''
    END
    WebAutomation.GoToWebPage.GoToWebPage BrowserInstance: Browser Url: TargetURL WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
    CALL IDパスワード入力
    WebAutomation.Click.Click BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'https://www.hug-globalkidsmethod.link/hug/wm/\'']['\'MENU\''] ClickType: WebAutomation.ClickType.LeftClick MouseClick: True
    WebAutomation.Click.Click BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'https://www.hug-globalkidsmethod.link/hug/wm/\'']['Anchor \'国保連請求 帳票・CSV出力\''] ClickType: WebAutomation.ClickType.LeftClick MouseClick: True
    CALL Loop2
END FUNCTION
